MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2007 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Defendant's Counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not reset at this time due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR# 7156. (212)

Ntc And Motion To Compel Compliance With 9/12/07 Discovery Order
Off Calendar Nov-15-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Joong Y. Im, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Jay Lee

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Jay Lee's motion to compel compliance with prior orders is granted in part. Defendant is ordered to comply with the prior order by serving complete verified responses within 7 days of notice of this order to all unanswered questions. The Court finds that defendant failed to fully comply with the prior order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1240 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2007 Continued To Nov-29-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Cousnel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Defendant's Counsel is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 11/29/2007 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR# 7156. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Joong Y. Im, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Jay Lee

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Jay Lee's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $390 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Jay Lee's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed and served by mail on July 16, 2007. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
